title: [HIDDEN] Schema
heading: [HIDDEN] Schema
content:
/\*! tailwindcss v4.1.17 | MIT License | https://tailwindcss.com \*/ @layer theme, base, components, utilities; @layer utilities;

### 

Field Formats

[](#field-formats)

Field

Field Description

**Object ID**

All Clever IDs take the ObjectID format. We guarantee that ObjectIDs are globally unique across districts and User objects.

**String**

Clever's `strings` have no maximum length - if you have to set maximum character lengths for fields, we recommend setting the max to 255 characters for safety.

**Date**

We normalize dates in Clever to YYYY-MM-DD: "2015-08-25"

**Timestamp**

Timestamps are expressed in this format: "2015-08-25T00:00:00.000Z"

**Boolean**

Booleans have a value of either "Y" or "N"

> 📘
> 
> **Fields are not returned in a specific order so please ensure that your app does not rely on the order.**
